title: Gun Belt
writer: Jack DeWitt, Arthur E. Orloff, Richard Schayer
actors: George Montgomery, Tab Hunter, Helen Westcott
plot: Outlaw Matt Ringo escapes prison and wants to co-opt his former outlaw brother Billy into robbing a Wells Fargo money shipment, but Billy has gone straight, the town Marshal is Wyatt Earp, and the Clinton gang wants in on the deal.
